testCases.title: Cart Merge - Anonymous Then Register
testCases.notes: BLOCKED — full E2E flow requires admin email verification capability per CSV note ('simulate email verification — check test email inbox or use admin to confirm account'). Within MCP browser scope, cannot reliably orchestrate fresh-account creation + admin email verify + sign-in within a single suite execution. The merge mechanism itself is verified by CART-058 (anonymous-then-existing-user merge produces correct qty summing). Recommend separate manual run with admin Notifications access per project memory reference_email_verification_workflow.md.

User Emily added Kingston SSD 1Tb qty=2; logged out via account-menu popup → Logout (data-testid main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button); added same SKU as guest qty=1; signed in as Emily; merged cart shows EXACTLY 1 line item with qty=3 (2+1 summed correctly, no duplicates), line total $334.17 = $111.39 × 3, subtotal $334.17, badge=3. mergeCart mutation no errors[]. BL-CART-006/007 honored.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Currency Mismatch
testCases.notes: SKIPPED — CSV asks to use {{EUR_USER_EMAIL}} (larch9900.mango@mail.com from .env) but full execution requires switching slot user mid-suite which conflicts with slot 2 isolation. Testing currency-mismatch merge across mixed user accounts in one suite breaks the per-slot-user invariant. Recommend separate dedicated EUR-user run — current slot 2 (Emily) is USD-default. Per CSV: BLOCKED pending verification — partially deferred.

Continued from CART-058 merged cart (Kingston 1Tb qty=3); logged out via popup → Logout; signed in again as Emily; cart persists IDENTICALLY: same 1 line item, qty=3, line total $334.17, subtotal $334.17, badge=3. No items lost or duplicated after logout/re-login cycle. BL-CART-006 honored.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Different Product Types
testCases.notes: BLOCKED per CSV — requires {{CONFIGURABLE_SKU}} with selectable variant (size or color) AND a simple product. The simple+configurable combo merge is partially covered by CART-058 (simple) and CART-072 (configurable same-config), but a dedicated simple+configurable cross-cart merge was not run due to time budget. CSV explicitly marks SEED REQUIRED status. CART-072 PASS shows configurable merge mechanism works.

Smart Merge Failure Handling — verified via CART-058/060/063/064/066/067/065/072 sequence: across 8 sign-in merges, cart page loaded without JS crash every time, no unhandled exception banner, no console errors, no 5xx on cart fetch or merge mutation. Storefront handles merge gracefully even with mixed selection states. The API negative test (malformed mergeCarts mutation via Postman/curl) is out of MCP browser scope per CSV TOOL-LIMITATION note — deferred to backend testing.

Cleared user cart via CLEAR CART → YES; logged out; added 2 distinct products (Kingston 1Tb + Kingston 512Gb) as guest with all auto-selected; signed in as Emily; merged cart shows 2 line items, both checkboxes checked (selectedForCheckout=true per ON default), subtotal $191.66 = $80.27 + $111.39, badge=2. Place Order disabled only due to missing shipping/payment selection (not selection-state related). BL-CART-006 honored.

User cart had Kingston 1Tb + Kingston 512Gb selected; logged out; added UNTUCKit eGift Card as guest (auto-selected); signed in as Emily; merged cart shows 3 line items (UNTUCKit + 2 Kingstons), all 5 vendor-select checkboxes checked, subtotal $291.65 = $99.99 + $80.27 + $111.39, badge=3. All items remain selected after merge. BL-CART-006 honored.

Cleared cart; user added Kingston 1Tb then unselected all vendor checkboxes; logged out; added Kingston 512Gb as guest, then unselected all vendor checkboxes (both sides unselected); signed in. After merge: 2 line items present (1Tb, 512Gb), ALL 3 vendor checkboxes UNSELECTED (both-unselected state preserved), Order Summary shows $0.00 (correct since no items selected for checkout), Place Order disabled. Both unselected state preserved on merge, NOT auto-reset to default ON. BL-CART-006 honored.

User had 3 items selected (UNTUCKit + 2 Kingstons); logged out; as guest added UNTUCKit qty=1 then unselected all 3 vendor checkboxes; signed in. After merge: 3 line items (UNTUCKit qty=2 = 1+1 summed, 2 Kingstons), ALL items selected (selection state reset to default ON, guest-side manual unselect not preserved). Subtotal $391.66 (Order Summary pre-discount) / $391.64 (footer post $0.02 discount). User's pre-selected items remain selected. BL-CART-006 honored. NOTE: Guest unselects do not survive merge when user side has selected items — system applies user-side selection bias post-merge.

Cleared cart; user added UNTUCKit + Kingston 1Tb + Kingston 512Gb, then UNSELECTED UNTUCKit (mixed user state); logged out; as guest added Nachos Chips + DOUWE EGBERTS Cocoa, then unselected first vendor (Nachos) creating mixed guest state; signed in. After merge: 5 line items present (Nachos, DOUWE EGBERTS, Kingston 512Gb, Kingston 1Tb, UNTUCKit) split across 2 vendor sections (Campina associate + N/A); selection state IS mixed (some checked, some unchecked among 8 total checkboxes). Order Summary reflects only selected items: subtotal $233.00 = DOUWE EGBERTS only. No blanket force-select or force-deselect; per-item state with merge logic respecting some prior state. BL-CART-006 honored.

User logged in, opened Configurable Hat PDP (CFG_HAT slug=configurable-hat), selected Black hat color via label.click(), clicked ADD TO CART → user cart=1 line, Configurable Hat $10/unit. Logged out; as guest reopened same PDP, selected Black hat (same configuration), ADD TO CART, then on /cart page increased qty to 2 → guest badge=2. Signed in as Emily. After merge: cart shows EXACTLY 1 line item for Configurable Hat, qty=3 (1 user + 2 guest summed), unit price $10.00, line total $30.00 = $10 × 3, subtotal $30.00, badge=3. No second line created for identical configuration. BL-CART-007 honored: identical configuration of same base product = duplicate, qty summed into one line.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Configurable Product, Different Configs Across User and Guest Carts
testCases.failedAssertion: [ASSERT] cart shows exactly 2 line items, both for Configurable Hat base product
testCases.notes: Cleared cart; user signed in, opened Configurable Hat PDP, selected Black hat option (option-A). PDP price showed $10.00 (Black=base price, no surcharge). ADD TO CART → user cart=1 line. Logged out; as guest reopened PDP, clicked Green hat radio (option-B, radio name=f8004e62, value=59e78525). PDP total updated to $28.00 ($10 base + $18 Green surcharge). ADD TO CART → guest cart=1 line. Signed in as Emily. EXPECTED: 2 distinct line items, one per configuration (Black option A + Green option B), per BL-CART-007 'different configurations create separate lines'. ACTUAL: cart shows ONLY 1 line item for Configurable Hat with qty=2, unit price $10.00, line total $20.00, subtotal $20.00, badge=2. The two distinct configurations (Black + Green) collapsed into a single line. Either (a) the merge collapsed different configurations into one line — BL-CART-007 violation; OR (b) my user-side Black-hat radio click did not actually update the configuration (PDP showed $10 because Black has $0 surcharge, indistinguishable from default 'None'). NEEDS INVESTIGATION: re-run with explicit radio[0]/radio[2] assertion on user side and verify configurationItems in getCart response. Filing preliminary bug BUG-030-001 — confirmed: false.

bugs.title: Configurable product different configs may collapse to single line after cross-cart merge
bugs.failedAssertion: [ASSERT] cart shows exactly 2 line items, both for Configurable Hat base product
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in as user; clear cart. 2. Open Configurable Hat PDP. 3. Select 'Black hat' option (option A) in 'Select your fav color' section. PDP shows Price: $10.00. 4. Click ADD TO CART. User cart shows 1 line, Configurable Hat $10. 5. Logout via account-menu → Logout popup. 6. As guest, reopen same PDP. Select 'Green hat' option (option B). PDP shows Price: $28.00 ($10 base + $18 surcharge). 7. Click ADD TO CART. Guest cart shows 1 line, Configurable Hat $10 (configured price). 8. Sign in. Navigate to /cart.
bugs.expected: Cart shows exactly 2 distinct line items for Configurable Hat: one with Black configuration (option A), one with Green configuration (option B). Per-line totals reflect each configuration. Cart subtotal = sum of both configured totals. BL-CART-007 exception: different configurations of the same base product create separate lines.
bugs.actual: Cart shows ONLY 1 line item for Configurable Hat with qty=2, unit price $10.00, line total $20.00, subtotal $20.00, badge=2. The two distinct configurations (Black hat + Green hat) appear collapsed into a single line item. No second line for the second configuration is visible in cart.
bugs.notes: Preliminary — needs investigation by qa-testing-expert. Possible alternative explanation: user-side Black hat radio click may not have applied (since PDP price stayed $10 = base price, indistinguishable from 'None' default). To confirm, re-run with: (a) explicit radio.click() via radio[0] selector on user side, (b) capture configurationItems via getCart query inspection, (c) verify the cart line's stored option ID. If both adds had identical configuration ('None'), the merge correctly collapsed them per BL-CART-007 (no bug); if configurations differ, this IS a merge bug.
